sections.title: Output Node
features: The Output node can now be renamed like other nodes
Used in the display with the format "Custom Name (Output)"

sections.title: Execution Console
features: Console messages were refined to be clearer and easier to read
Main display was streamlined to show only essentials, with richer context available in details

sections.title: Node Visualization
features: Visual improvements were made to node rendering for clearer pipeline readability
Canvas readability was improved to make flow elements easier to distinguish

sections.title: SetVariable Node
features: New SetVariable node to extract values and assign them to your pipeline variables
The "Variable Name" field now only suggests parameter variables to avoid confusion

sections.title: Interface
features: Added a visible delete button on links to make removal easier without relying on keyboard shortcuts

sections.title: Bugs & Stability
features: Fixed variable resolution in the Output node (simple variable, object variable, and path cases)
Simplified output details to show only the requested output path and final value

sections.title: Variables
features: Use variables everywhere (URL, body, output path)
Combine text and variables easily (e.g. #host#endpoint)
Automatic variable suggestions while typing
Insert the selected variable exactly at the cursor position

sections.title: Interface
features: Headers editor in table format (easier to edit, no JSON needed)
Add, edit, or remove headers directly in the inspector
Shows the sent request (method, URL, headers, body) in a dedicated tab
View request and response in two separate tabs

sections.title: Bugs & Stability
features: Better handling for multi-line JSON
Visual validation for JSON headers and JSON body
Clearer and more user-friendly validation messages
API errors are shown in a more actionable way

sections.title: Quick Execution
features: Run your pipeline directly from the canvas
Fewer back-and-forth actions with the toolbar

sections.title: Bugs & Stability
features: More reliable execution, even on complex flows
Fewer unexpected stops during execution

sections.title: Interface
features: Cleaner palette and canvas for faster use
Inspector panel is easier to read

sections.title: 6 Nodes to Build
features: Start: the entry point of your pipeline
API Request: fetch or send data
Condition: branch into true/false paths
Filter: keep only the items you need
Transform: reshape data for your use case
Output: expose the final result

sections.title: Export & Import
features: One-click JSON export
Automatic filename generation
Guided import with structure validation
